---
# Source: issue-9027/charts/subchart/templates/values.yaml
global:
  hash:
    key1: 1
    key2: 2
    key3: 13
    key4: 4
    key5: 5
    key6: 6
hash:
  key1: 1
  key2: 2
  key3: 13
  key4: 4
  key5: 5
  key6: 6

---
# Source: issue-9027/templates/values.yaml
global:
  hash:
    key3: 13
subchart:
  global:
    hash:
      key1: 1
      key2: 2
      key3: 13
      key4: 4
      key5: 5
      key6: 6
  hash:
    key1: 1
    key2: 2
    key3: 13
    key4: 4
    key5: 5
    key6: 6
